title: Data Fetch Crash on /crowmark
actual: UI displays crash or "Unable to load" message
rootCause: Missing database table, failing RLS policy, or malformed schema
fix: Verify database schema and RLS policies match frontend expectations

title: Potential IDOR / Tenant Isolation Failure
actual: 200 OK and page attempts to render
rootCause: Missing Supabase RLS policy enforcing org_id or user_id ownership
fix: Enforce RLS policies on all tables and verify UUID ownership in API routes
